nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Martinique thrasher
nodes.summary: Martinique thrasher（Martinique thrasher，学名 Ramphocinclus brachyurus），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Martinique thrasher total population is estimated at 133-267 individuals and is ranked as "endangered" according to the IUCN Red List. The rate of decline of the population has largely increased due to habitat loss.Young RP, Baptiste TJN, Dornelly A, Temple H, Whitehead H, Young HG, Morton MN
